title: 集体投资计划守则 / Collective Investment Schemes (CIS)
summary: CIS 汇集众多投资者资金由管理人统一管理;零售发售须授权/认可 + 注册招股书;但 MAS 授权≠背书或保证。 / A CIS pools many investors’ money under collective management; retail offers must be authorised/recognised with a registered prospectus — but MAS authorisation is not an endorsement or guarantee.

sections.heading: 什么是 CIS
sections.body: 汇集多名投资者资金、按既定目标统一投资,投资者按份额分享收益与风险(如单位信托/基金)。

sections.heading: What is a CIS
sections.body: Pools investors’ money invested collectively toward a stated objective; investors share returns and risks pro-rata (e.g. unit trusts/funds).

sections.heading: 授权与提示
sections.body: 零售发售须获授权(本地)/认可(境外)并注册招股书披露目标/风险/费用;MAS 授权/注册并非背书或回报保证。

sections.heading: Authorisation & caveat
sections.body: Retail offers must be authorised (local)/recognised (foreign) with a registered prospectus disclosing objective/risks/fees; MAS authorisation/registration is not an endorsement or guarantee.

keyPoints: 汇集资金、统一管理 / Pooled money, collective management
零售发售须授权+招股书 / Retail offer needs authorisation + prospectus
MAS 授权/注册≠背书或保证 / MAS authorisation ≠ guarantee
sourceRef: SFA CIS offer regime + MAS Code on Collective Investment Schemes / OPERA prospectus registration
